<var>
$DPS$ = Splash Damage / Firerate
$MDPS$ = DPS * Max Hits
$CE$ = Total Price / DPS
$TP$ = $FNC-TOTALPRICE$
$FNC-COST$ = 100; 25; 150; 600; 1500; 3600
$FNC-PVP-COST$ = 200; 125; 500; 800; 1500; 3000
$FNC-DETECTION$ = 1; ;
$FNC-UPGRADE$ = Paintball Gear; Shoulder Pads; Double Barrel Gun; Competitive Gear
$FNC-UPGRADEICON$ = 3280081327; 3319083300; 3280082028; 3319084508; 3319085582
$FNC-ROFBUG$ = Firerate
$MREF$ = <ref>Max DPS is calculated as DPS x Max Hits.</ref>
$CREF$ = <ref>Cost Efficiency is calculated with normal DPS.</ref>
</var>
<div class="mobile-tabber"><tabber>
|-|Regular =
<div class="overflow-box">
{| class="wikitable stats-table"
! Level !! Total Price !! Splash Damage !! Firerate !! Range !! Explosion Range !! Max Hits !! DPS !! Max DPS$MREF$ !! Cost Efficiency$CREF$
|-
| 0 || {{Money|$TP$}} || 1 || 1.7 || 7.5 || 3 || 8 || $DPS$ || $MDPS$ || {{Money|$CE$}}
|-
| 1 || {{Money|$TP$}} || 1 || 1.7 || 9 || 3.5 || 8 || $DPS$ || $MDPS$ || {{Money|$CE$}}
|-
| 2 || {{Money|$TP$}} || 2 || 1.4 || 9 || 4 || 8 || $DPS$ || $MDPS$ || {{Money|$CE$}}
|-
| 3 || {{Money|$TP$}} || 3 || 0.7 || 9 || 4 || 8 || $DPS$ || $MDPS$ || {{Money|$CE$}}
|-
| 4 || {{Money|$TP$}} || 8 || 0.7 || 10.5 || 4.5 || 8 || $DPS$ || $MDPS$ || {{Money|$CE$}}
|-
| 5 || {{Money|$TP$}} || 20 || 0.7 || 10.5 || 5 || 8 || $DPS$ || $MDPS$ || {{Money|$CE$}}
|}
</div>
|-|PVP =
<div class="overflow-box">
{| class="wikitable stats-table"
! Level !! Total Price !! Splash Damage !! Firerate !! Range !! Explosion Range !! Max Hits !! DPS !! Max DPS$MREF$ !! Cost Efficiency$CREF$
|-
| 0 || {{Money|$TP$}} || 2 || 1.6 || 9 || 3 || 8 || $DPS$ || $MDPS$ || {{Money|$CE$}}
|-
| 1 || {{Money|$TP$}} || 3 || 1.6 || 9.5 || 3 || 8 || $DPS$ || $MDPS$ || {{Money|$CE$}}
|-
| 2 || {{Money|$TP$}} || 6 || 1.3 || 9.5 || 3.5 || 8 || $DPS$ || $MDPS$ || {{Money|$CE$}}
|-
| 3 || {{Money|$TP$}} || 8 || 0.9 || 9.5 || 3.5 || 8 || $DPS$ || $MDPS$ || {{Money|$CE$}}
|-
| 4 || {{Money|$TP$}} || 12 || 0.75 || 11 || 4 || 8 || $DPS$ || $MDPS$ || {{Money|$CE$}}
|-
| 5 || {{Money|$TP$}} || 18 || 0.6 || 13 || 4.5 || 8 || $DPS$ || $MDPS$ || {{Money|$CE$}}
|}
</div>
</tabber></div>
